source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Daddy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: cing1 waa1 cung4 jyu5 wu4 dip6
cards.english: [Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa同George嚟幫豬爺爺打理花園
cards.jyutping: tung4 lai4 bong1 zyu1 je4 je2 daa2 lei5 faa1 jyun4
cards.english: Peppa and George have come to help Grandpa Pig in the garden.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ne1 zek3 wu4 dip6 zan1 hai6 hou2 leng3 aa3
cards.english: This butterfly is so beautiful.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爺爺，點解蝴蝶咁鍾意花𠸏？
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 dim2 gaai2 wu4 dip6 gam3 zung1 ji3 faa1 ge2
cards.english: Grandpa, why do butterflies like flowers so much?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 因為佢哋要喺花度揾食物𠺢嗎
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 keoi5 dei6 jiu3 hai2 faa1 dou6 wan2 sik6 mat6 gaa1 maa1
cards.english: Because they need to find food on the flowers.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dim2 wan2 aa3
cards.english: How do they find it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 jau5 jat1 tiu4 hou2 zoeng6 ge3 lei6
cards.english: They have a very long tongue.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung6 zoeng6 gwo3 ngo5 tiu4 lei6
cards.english: Longer than my tongue?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: juk1 hai6 aa3
cards.english: Oh, yes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 蝴蝶條脷仲長過你嗰條脷好多㗎
cards.jyutping: wu4 dip6 tiu4 lei6 zung6 coeng4 gwo3 nei5 go2 tiu4 lei6 hou2 do1 gaa4
cards.english: The butterfly's tongue is much longer than your tongue.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 佢會利用條脷嚟飲花蜜㗎
cards.jyutping: keoi5 wui6 lei6 jung6 tiu4 lei6 lai4 jam2 faa1 mat6 gaa4
cards.english: It uses its tongue to drink nectar.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa，隻蝴蝶以為你係朵花啊
cards.jyutping: zek3 wu4 dip6 ji5 wai4 nei5 hai6 do2 faa1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa, the butterfly thinks you're a flower!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我唔係一朵花嚟㗎，我叫做Peppa啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 hai6 jat1 do2 faa1 lai4 gaa4 ngo5 giu3 zou6 aa3
cards.english: I'm not a flower, I'm called Peppa!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zan1 hai6 hou2 leng3 aa3
cards.english: It's really beautiful!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 soeng2 zou6 wu4 dip6 aa3
cards.english: I want to be a butterfly too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai2 dou6 baan6 gan2 jat1 zek3 wu4 dip6
cards.english: Peppa is pretending to be a butterfly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zek3 siu2 wu4 dip6
cards.english: I'm a little butterfly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dou1 soeng2 baan6 wu4 dip6 wo3
cards.english: George also wants to pretend to be a butterfly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 sin1 zek3 wu4 dip6 aa3
cards.english: George, I'm the butterfly!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 baan6 gwo3 dai6 ji6 di1 je5 aa3
cards.english: You have to pretend to be something else.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我諗到喇，你可以扮條蟲仔吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 dou3 laa3 nei5 ho2 ji5 baan6 tiu4 cung4 zai2 aa1
cards.english: I've got it, you can pretend to be a little worm!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你哋睇下，我係隻小蝴蝶
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 tai2 haa6 ngo5 hai6 zek3 siu2 wu4 dip6
cards.english: Look at me, I'm a little butterfly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 tai2 lai4 m4 soeng2 zou6 cung2 zai2
cards.english: Oh no, it seems George doesn't want to be a little worm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 soeng2 zou6 wu4 dip6 wo3
cards.english: He wants to be a butterfly!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George，當爺爺仲係好細個嗰陣
cards.jyutping: dong3 je4 je4 zung6 hai6 hou2 sai3 go3 go2 zan6
cards.english: George, when Grandpa was still very little,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我好鍾意扮爬緊嘅蟲仔㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 baan6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2 gaa4
cards.english: I really liked pretending to be a crawling worm,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jiu3 baan6 cung4 zai2 hou2 jung4 ji6 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: Pretending to be a worm is very easy,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 si6 faan6 bei2 nei5 tai2 laa1
cards.english: Let me demonstrate for you,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 首先，你要將成個人瞓晒喺個地下上面
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 nei5 jiu3 zoeng1 sing4 go3 jan4 fan3 saai3 hai2 go3 dei6 haa6 soeng6 min6
cards.english: First, you need to lie your whole body flat on the ground,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 然後，你就用個身嚟爬啦
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 nei5 zau6 jung6 go3 san1 lai4 paa4 laa1
cards.english: Then, you use your body to crawl,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 hai6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung4 aa3
cards.english: I am a crawling worm!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George同豬爺爺扮蟲仔，扮得好開心噉喎
cards.jyutping: tung4 zyu1 je4 je2 baan6 cung4 zai2 baan6 dak1 hou2 hoi1 sam1 gam2 wo3
cards.english: George and Grandpa Pig are pretending to be worms, and are very happy,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zek3 siu2 wu4 dip6
cards.english: I am a little butterfly...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 ngo5 hai6 zek3 siu2 wu4 dip6 aa3
cards.english: Look, I am a little butterfly!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 係啊，Peppa，你係隻好靚嘅蝴蝶啊
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 nei5 hai6 zek3 hou2 leng3 ge3 wu4 dip6 aa3
cards.english: Yes, Peppa, you are a very pretty butterfly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 nei5 dei6 zou6 gan2 me1 aa3
cards.english: Grandpa, George, what are you doing?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau6 hai6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2
cards.english: We are crawling worms.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我都想扮爬緊嘅蟲仔啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 soeng2 baan6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2 aa3
cards.english: I want to pretend to be a crawling worm too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2
cards.english: I am a crawling worm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2 aa3
cards.english: I am a crawling worm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2
cards.english: I am a crawling worm...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hou2 maa1
cards.english: How are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我愛你，我係爬緊嘅蟲仔
cards.jyutping: ngo5 oi3 nei5 ngo5 hai6 paa4 gan2 ge3 cung2 zai2
cards.english: I love you, I am a crawling worm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 hou2 hou2 wun6 aa1
cards.english: Is it really fun?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你哋而家想扮咩動物啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 soeng2 baan6 me1 dung6 mat6 aa3
cards.english: What animals do you want to pretend to be now?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 zi1 dou3 wo3
cards.english: I don't know.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爺爺，睇下，有隻青蛙喺度啊
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 tai2 haa6 jau5 zek3 cing1 waa1 hai2 dou6 aa3
cards.english: Grandpa, look, there's a frog over there.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 不如我哋今次扮青蛙吖？
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 ngo5 dei6 gam1 ci3 baan6 cing1 waa1 aa1
cards.english: How about we pretend to be frogs this time?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係青蛙又冇蝴蝶咁靚
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 cing1 waa1 jau6 mou5 wu4 dip6 gam3 leng3
cards.english: But frogs aren't as pretty as butterflies.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 ci5 cung2 zai2 sik1 paa4 wo3
cards.english: And they can't crawl like little worms.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係青蛙會做一樣你鍾意嘅嘢喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 cing1 waa1 wui6 zou6 jat1 joeng6 nei5 zung1 ji3 ge3 je5 wo3
cards.english: But frogs can do something you like.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: mat1 cing1 waa1 wui6 waan2 gung1 zai2 gaa4 me1
cards.english: What, frogs play with dolls?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa真係傻㗎，你鍾意玩咩遊戲啊？
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 so4 gaa4 nei5 zung1 ji3 waan2 me1 jau4 hei3 aa3
cards.english: Peppa is so silly, what game do you like to play?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 tiu3 lok6 di1 nai4 tam5 dou6
cards.english: It's jumping in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 冇錯喇，青蛙都鍾意跳落泥氹度㗎
cards.jyutping: mou5 co3 laa3 cing1 waa1 dou1 zung1 ji3 tiu3 lok6 nai4 tam5 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: That's right, frogs also like to jump into muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 jat1 cai4 baan6 cing1 waa1 aa1
cards.english: Okay, George, let's pretend to be frogs together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zek3 siu2 cing1 waa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zek3 siu2 cing1 waa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 班青蛙揾到個好適合嘅大泥氹嚟跳喎
cards.jyutping: baan1 cing1 waa1 wan2 dou3 go3 hou2 sik1 hap6 ge3 daai6 nai4 tam5 lai4 tiu3 wo3
cards.english: The frogs have found a great big muddy puddle to jump in.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa同George好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Peppa and George love jumping up and down in the muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 大家都好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Everyone loves jumping up and down in the muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E17 Frogs, Worms, and Butterflies［青蛙、蟲、與蝴蝶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wu4 dip6 tung4 cung4 zai2 dou1 hou2 hou2
cards.english: The butterflies and insects are also very good.
